#### The purpose of this pyspark notebook is to read Delta tables from owb_standarsied_db to owb_harmonisied_db and load all records as Delta tables along with metadata columns.

**Author**               **Created Date**              **Description**  
Rohit Shukla         04-Mar-2025             The functionality of this notebook is to Delta Table dim_inspector_address into owb-harmonisied_db layer.

#import all libraries and initialise Spark Session
import calendar
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, date
import requests
import pyspark.sql.functions as F 
import re
from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql.functions import lit, current_timestamp, to_date ,expr, md5, col, date_format,when, to_date,current_date,concat,cast,regexp_replace,coalesce,concat_ws,row_number, to_timestamp
from pprint import pprint as pp
from pyspark.sql.types import *
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
spark = SparkSession.builder.getOrCreate()
from delta.tables import DeltaTable
#ignore FutureWarning messages 
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message="iteritems is deprecated")

# Define delta table names, database name and table paths
source_database_name = "odw_standardised_db"
target_database_name = "odw_harmonised_db"
source_delta_table = f"{source_database_name}.inspector_addresses_weekly"
target_delta_table = f"{target_database_name}.sap_hr_inspector_address"
delta_table_path = f"abfss://odw-harmonised@{storage_account}saphr/sap_hr_inspector_address"

print(source_delta_table)
print(target_delta_table)
print(delta_table_path)

# Step 1: Read source Delta Tables
#df_source_inspector_address = spark.read.format("delta").option("inferSchema", "false").table(source_delta_table)

src_spark_sql = f"""SELECT DISTINCT
                    COALESCE(inspector_raw.id, r2.id, inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber, -1) AS source_id,
                    sap_hr.PersNo AS pins_staff_number,
                    COALESCE(SAPPreferredName.PreferredFirstName, sap_hr.FirstName) AS given_names,
                    COALESCE(SAPPreferredName.PreferredFamilyName, sap_hr.Lastname) AS family_name,
                    COALESCE(
                        CONCAT(SAPPreferredName.PreferredFirstName, ' ', SAPPreferredName.PreferredFamilyName),
                        CONCAT(sap_hr.FirstName, ' ', sap_hr.LastName)
                    ) AS inspector_name,
                    inspector_address.PostalCode AS inspector_postcode,
                    UPPER(sap_hr.EmploymentStatus) AS active_status,
                    NULL AS branch,
                    sap_hr.OrgStartDate AS date_in,
                    NULL AS date_out,
                    inspector_address.ChartingOfficerforInspector AS eo_responsible,
                    CASE 
                        WHEN sap_hr.WorkContract = 'Non-Salaried Inspector' THEN 'NSI'
                        WHEN sap_hr.PSgroup = 'BAND 1' AND sap_hr.WorkC = 'FT' THEN 'FTC-B1'
                        WHEN sap_hr.PSgroup = 'BAND 2' AND sap_hr.WorkC = 'FT' THEN 'FTC-B2'
                        WHEN sap_hr.PSgroup = 'BAND 3' AND sap_hr.WorkC = 'FT' THEN 'FTC-B3'
                        WHEN sap_hr.PSgroup = 'BAND 1' AND sap_hr.WorkC <> 'FT' THEN 'B1'
                        WHEN sap_hr.PSgroup = 'BAND 2' AND sap_hr.WorkC <> 'FT' THEN 'B2'
                        WHEN sap_hr.PSgroup = 'BAND 3' AND sap_hr.WorkC <> 'FT' THEN 'B3'
                        ELSE sap_hr.PSgroup
                    END AS grade,
                    CASE
                        WHEN sap_hr.WorkContract = 'Non-Salaried Inspector' THEN 'NSI'
                        ELSE inspector_group.resource_group
                    END AS resource_group,
                    NULL AS staff,
                    NULL AS trainee_level,
                    inspector_group.inspector_group,
                    ROUND(sap_hr.FTE, 2) AS FTE,
                    sap_hr.Location AS primary_location,
                    NULL AS primary_FTE,
                    NULL AS secondary_location,
                    NULL AS secondary_FTE,
                    CONCAT_WS(' ',
                        inspector_address.StreetandHouseNumber,
                        inspector_address.2ndAddressLine,
                        inspector_address.City,
                        inspector_address.District,
                        inspector_address.PostalCode,
                        inspector_address.Region
                    ) AS InspectorAddress,
                    inspector_address.Telephoneno,
                    inspector_address.WorkMobile,
                    CASE WHEN sap_hr.Position1 = 'Inspector Manager' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_sgl,
                    CASE 
                        WHEN sap_hr.WorkContract = 'Non-Salaried Inspector' AND sap_hr.EmploymentStatus = 'ACTIVE'
                            THEN 'nsi.planning@planninginspectorate.gov.uk'
                        ELSE vw_SAP_HR_email.email_address
                    END AS pins_email_address,
                    CASE 
                        WHEN sap_hr.WorkContract = 'Non-Salaried Inspector' THEN 'Non-Salaried Inspector'
                        ELSE sap_hr.OrganizationalUnit
                    END AS resource_code,
                    CASE 
                        WHEN sap_hr.WorkC = 'FT' THEN 'FTC'
                        WHEN sap_hr.WorkContract = 'Non-Salaried Inspector' THEN 'NSI'
                        ELSE 'Salaried'
                    END AS emp_type,
                    sp_list_inspector_map.HorizonID,
                    'SAP' AS inspectorSource
                FROM odw_harmonised_db.load_sap_hr_monthly sap_hr
                LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.load_sp_list_inspector_map sp_list_inspector_map
                    ON sap_hr.PersNo = sp_list_inspector_map.StaffNumber
                LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.load_inspector_raw inspector_raw
                    ON CAST(sap_hr.EmployeeNo AS INT) = inspector_raw.PINSStaffNumber
                LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.load_inspector_raw r2
                    ON CAST(sap_hr.PersNo AS INT) = r2.PINSStaffNumber
                LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.sap_hr_inspector_address inspector_address
                    ON sap_hr.PersNo = inspector_address.StaffNumber
                    AND inspector_address.IsActive = 1
                LEFT JOIN (
                    SELECT PersNo, MAX(Leaving) AS Leaving
                    FROM odw_harmonised_db.load_sap_hr_leavers
                    GROUP BY PersNo
                ) leavers
                    ON sap_hr.PersNo = leavers.PersNo
                LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.bis_inspector_group inspector_group
                    ON sap_hr.OrganizationalUnit = inspector_group.sap_ou
                LEFT JOIN odw_harmonised_db.load_vw_sap_hr_email vw_SAP_HR_email
                    ON sap_hr.PersNo = vw_SAP_HR_email.PersNo
                LEFT JOIN odw_standardised_db.load_sappreferredname SAPPreferredName
                    ON sap_hr.PersNo = SAPPreferredName.PERSNO
                WHERE
                    sap_hr.PSgroup IN ('APO', 'APP HEO', 'BAND 1','BAND 2','BAND 3', 'PL')
                    OR sap_hr.WorkContract = 'Non-Salaried Inspector'
    OR sap_hr.Position1 IN ('Cost Decision Officer', 'Chief Operating Officer', 'Chief Planning Inspector')"""

df_temp_inspector_address = spark.sql(src_spark_sql)

display(df_temp_inspector_address.count())

print(df_temp_inspector_address.printSchema())

display(df_temp_inspector_address)

# Add the RowID column to the DataFrame
rowid_columns = [c for c in df_transform_inspector_address.columns]

# Convert RowID columns to hash values
rowid_expr = md5(concat_ws("|", *[coalesce(col(c).cast("string"), lit("")) for c in rowid_columns]))

# Add the RowID column to the DataFrame
df_transform_inspector_address = df_transform_inspector_address.withColumn("RowID", rowid_expr)

display(df_transform_inspector_address.count())

# Removing duplicate records using row_number
dedup_spec = Window.partitionBy("StaffNumber").orderBy(to_date(col("Chngdon"),'dd/MM/yyyy').desc())
df_transform_inspector_address = df_transform_inspector_address.withColumn("rn", row_number().over(dedup_spec)).filter("rn == 1").drop("rn")

#display(df_transform_inspector_address.count())

df_tgt_inspector_address = spark.table(f"{target_delta_table}")

# Update the existing records
df_update_records_inspector_address = df_transform_inspector_address.alias("src").join(df_tgt_inspector_address.alias("tgt"), on="StaffNumber", how="inner").select("src.*").withColumn("SourceSystemID", lit("SapHr")).withColumn("IngestionDate", current_timestamp()).withColumn("ValidFrom", col("StartDate")).withColumn("ValidTo", to_timestamp(col("EndDate"),"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS")).withColumn("IsActive", lit('Y'))

#Add new records
df_new_records_inspector_address = df_transform_inspector_address.join(
    df_tgt_inspector_address.select("StaffNumber").withColumnRenamed("StaffNumber", "existing_StaffNumber"),
    df_transform_inspector_address["StaffNumber"] == col("existing_StaffNumber"),
    how="left_anti"
).withColumn("SourceSystemID", lit("SapHr")).withColumn("IngestionDate", current_timestamp()).withColumn("ValidFrom", col("StartDate")).withColumn("ValidTo", to_timestamp(col("EndDate"),"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS")).withColumn("IsActive", lit('Y'))

#display(df_transform_inspector_address.count())
#display(df_tgt_inspector_address.count())
#display(df_new_records_inspector_address.count())

df_merged_records_inspector_address = df_new_records_inspector_address.union(df_new_records_inspector_address).dropDuplicates()

#display(df_merged_records_inspector_address)

# Write new records to target Delta Table
try:
    # Overwrite the entire delta table with transfored dataframe
    df_merged_records_inspector_address.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").save(delta_table_path)


    print(f" Records overwritten successfully to {target_delta_table}")

except Exception as e:
    print(f" Error writing to {target_delta_table}: {str(e)}")
    raise
